data.title: Yangzijiang Shipbuilding Secures US$0.44 Billion in New Contracts
data.description:
Yangzijiang Shipbuilding (Holdings) ( (SG:BS6) ) has issued an announcement.

Yangzijiang Shipbuilding has secured new contracts for eight vessels, valued at US$0.44 billion, including containerships and bulk carriers, with deliveries scheduled between 2027 and 2029. This adds to a total of 44 contracts worth US$1.90 billion for the year, highlighting the company’s robust order book and strong industry positioning, particularly with long-term partner Seaspan Corporation.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:BS6) stock is a Buy with a S$3.55 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Yangzijiang Shipbuilding (Holdings) stock, see the SG:BS6 Stock Forecast page.

More about Yangzijiang Shipbuilding (Holdings)

Yangzijiang Shipbuilding (Holdings) Ltd, incorporated in Singapore, operates in the shipbuilding industry, focusing on the construction of containerships and bulk carriers. The company is known for its strategic partnerships and has a significant presence in the global shipbuilding market.

Current Market Cap: S$12.96B

data.title: Mare Group Reports Strong Interim Growth and Raises 2025 Guidance
data.description:
Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ) just unveiled an update.

Mare Group S.p.A. reported significant growth in its interim financial results as of June 30, 2025, with revenues expanding by 50% on a consolidated basis and 90% pro-forma. data.title: Metalero Mining Launches $300,000 Private Placement for Benson Project Expansion
data.description:
Cortus Metals ( (TSE:MLO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Metalero Mining Corp. has announced a $300,000 private placement to advance its Benson Project in the Quesnel Trough of British Columbia. The funds will be used for exploration activities, including sampling and geophysics, to capitalize on recent copper and gold soil anomalies. The project benefits from strategic location and infrastructure, and the offering is subject to regulatory approvals.

More about Cortus Metals

Metalero Mining Corp. is a Canadian-based junior exploration company focusing on copper and gold projects in North America. Its flagship project, the Benson Project, spans 166 square kilometers and is accessible by road, containing five prospects with porphyry-related mineralized systems rich in gold and copper.

Average Trading Volume: 68,093

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3.4M

data.title: Moving iMage Technologies Reports Improved Financial Performance
data.description:
Moving iMage Technologies, Inc., a prominent player in the out-of-home entertainment technology sector, specializes in providing advanced solutions for cinemas, Esports, and various entertainment venues. The company recently released its fourth-quarter and fiscal year 2025 earnings report, highlighting improvements in its financial performance and strategic advancements.

In the latest earnings report, Moving iMage Technologies reported a significant reduction in its net loss for Q4’25, improving to $156,000 from $416,000 in the previous year. The company also saw an increase in its year-end net cash position to $5.7 million, up from $5.3 million the previous year. Despite a decline in revenue, the company managed to improve its gross margin for the fiscal year to 25.2%, up from 23.3% in FY’24, by focusing on higher-margin opportunities.

The company has secured a contract to install 150 Barco laser cinema projectors over the next three years, indicating a strategic focus on expanding its footprint in the cinema technology market. Additionally, Moving iMage Technologies continues to pursue opportunities in laser projection technology, Direct View LED displays, and immersive audio solutions, leveraging its strong industry reputation.

Looking ahead, Moving iMage Technologies remains cautiously optimistic about its prospects for FY’26, anticipating a modest increase in cinema technology upgrades. The company expects revenue for Q1’26 to be approximately $4.9 million, with a stronger performance anticipated in the latter half of the fiscal year due to industry planning and budget cycles.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: KNOT Offshore Partners LP Reports Strong Q2 2025 Results
data.description:
KNOT Offshore Partners LP is a publicly traded master limited partnership that owns, operates, and acquires shuttle tankers primarily under long-term charters in the offshore oil production regions of Brazil and the North Sea.

In its latest earnings report for the second quarter of 2025, KNOT Offshore Partners LP reported total revenues of $87.1 million, operating income of $22.2 million, and a net income of $6.8 million. The company also declared a quarterly cash distribution of $0.026 per common unit and reported $104.8 million in available liquidity.

Key highlights from the quarter include a fleet utilization rate of nearly 97% when accounting for scheduled drydockings, the acquisition of the DP2 shuttle tanker Daqing Knutsen, and the establishment of a $10 million buyback program for common units. The company also secured charter extensions and new agreements, enhancing its charter coverage for the upcoming years.

Looking ahead, KNOT Offshore Partners LP remains optimistic about the growth of the shuttle tanker market, particularly in Brazil and the North Sea, driven by new production start-ups and a tightening market. The company aims to strengthen its fleetwide charter coverage and seize opportunities for re-chartering vessels in the current market environment.

With a focus on generating stable cash flows and executing strategic acquisitions, KNOT Offshore Partners LP is well-positioned to benefit from the improving charter market, aiming to enhance unitholder value in the coming quarters and years.

data.title: Acrophyte Hospitality Trust Updates Strategic Review Amidst Capital Expenditure Needs
data.description:
ARA US Hospitality Trust ( (SG:XZL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Acrophyte Hospitality Trust has announced an update on its ongoing strategic review, assisted by DBS Bank Ltd., to address substantial capital expenditure needs. The company anticipates spending approximately US$100 million on brand-mandated renovations and maintenance from FY2025 to FY2027, which were previously deferred due to the COVID-19 pandemic. This expenditure is crucial to comply with brand standards and franchise terms, as non-compliance could lead to default notices.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:XZL) stock is a Buy with a $0.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ARA US Hospitality Trust stock, see the SG:XZL Stock Forecast page.

More about ARA US Hospitality Trust

Acrophyte Hospitality Trust is a stapled group consisting of Acrophyte Hospitality Property Trust and Acrophyte Hospitality Management Trust, both constituted under the laws of the Republic of Singapore. The company operates in the real estate investment sector, focusing on hospitality properties and management.

data.title: First Tellurium Clarifies Recent Promotional Activities Amid Trading Volume Increase
data.description:
An announcement from First Tellurium Corp ( (TSE:FTEL) ) is now available.

First Tellurium Corp., a company involved in tellurium-based technologies and thermoelectric modules, responded to a request from OTC Markets regarding recent promotional activities related to its shares. The company clarified that it engaged Hillside Consulting for marketing services, which included digital marketing and content creation, to increase corporate awareness. The promotional activities coincided with an increase in trading volume, but the company attributes this to prior press releases rather than the promotional efforts. The company emphasized the importance of investor due diligence and transparency in its regulatory filings.

First Tellurium Corp’s overall stock score is low due to significant financial challenges including persistent losses and high leverage. data.title: Universal Digital Inc. Announces Strategic Initiatives and Debt Settlement
data.description:
Lode Metals Corp. ( (TSE:LFG) ) has issued an update.

Universal Digital Inc. has announced several strategic initiatives, including debt settlements and new agreements, to bolster its growth and market presence. The company settled $200,400 in debt through the issuance of common shares and entered into a marketing agreement with Outside The Box Capital to enhance its digital presence. Additionally, a strategic advisory agreement was signed to support its blockchain and AI initiatives, reflecting the company’s commitment to advancing its digital asset investment strategy and increasing investor awareness.

More about Lode Metals Corp.

Universal Digital Inc. is a Canadian investment company focused on digital assets, businesses, and entities in high-growth industries, particularly in blockchain, cryptocurrencies, and cryptocurrency technologies. The company aims to provide shareholders with long-term capital growth through a diversified investment approach and to participate in the transformation of global finance through digital asset strategies.
